# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.3] - 2026-03-07

### Bug Fixes

- Match YARA's strataCount sentinel value to prevent aggressive SA exploration ([#11](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/rust-yara/pull/11))
